project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite frontend with Express 5 + WebSocket + SQLite backend
test_framework: No test framework detected; manual verification only
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npx tsc --noEmit' to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run 'npm run build' to verify Vite build succeeds.
environment_constraints: No test runner. No docker. Verification is TypeScript compilation and Vite build.
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts (3953 lines) holds all game logic for hotseat mode plus client-side optimistic updates. Server in src/server/index.ts (2412 lines) handles online message routing. Types in src/types/game.ts. Game logic utilities in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. CSS in src/App.css (single file). Dual-type monsters: Fukurokuju (sp-fukurokuju) = daimyo + fortress, Hotei (su-hotei) = shinto, Komainu (sp-komainu) = shinto, Yurei (su-yurei) = daimyo. Temple figures stored as { playerId, figureId } without monsterCardId. Monster placement uses monsterPlacementPopupVisible/monsterPlacementCard/komainuChoiceVisible in store. Reserve display via computeReserveTotals in PlayerPanel.tsx. Kami summary ready-check uses KAMI_SUMMARY_READY messages to server; server checks kamiSummaryReadyPlayers count but does NOT validate that kamiSummaryVisible is true before accepting ready signals.
directory_structure: src/components/ - all UI components, src/store/gameStore.ts - Zustand state, src/server/index.ts - Express+WS server, src/utils/gameLogic.ts - pure game logic functions, src/types/game.ts - TypeScript types and constants, src/App.css - all styles
